c_form_energy.name: Form Energy
c_form_energy.description: Iron-air 100h+ LDES. ArcelorMittal $100M strategic. Georgia gigafactory under construction. Three US utility contracts.

critical_gaps.label: No Commercial Contract
critical_gaps.memo: No binding commercial agreement on record. All revenue is hypothetical.

critical_gaps.label: No Third-Party Certification
critical_gaps.memo: No independent certification (DNV GL, TÜV, KPX, UL). Required for regulated procurement.

critical_gaps.label: No Named Strategic Buyer
critical_gaps.memo: No named strategic buyer in any signal. Demand-side validation absent.

critical_gaps.label: No Deployment / Go-Live
critical_gaps.memo: No operational deployment confirmed. TRL-9 in commercial setting unverified.
